prestazioni: K24Z7 (2.4L i-VTEC) engine swap with a custom-built Hasport K24A2 transmission mount kit and a K-Tuned K24A2 header for optimized exhaust scavenging, paired with a Garrett GT3076R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) running 22 psi on a Hondata KPro V4 ECU with custom ethanol mapping for E85 fuel compatibility

Full bolt-on drivetrain reinforcement: Fidanza 87mm aluminum flywheel, ACT 6-puck Xtreme Race clutch, and a Cusco Type-RS 1.5-way limited-slip differential with 25% preload for aggressive power delivery to the front wheels

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valving for 8th-gen Civic Si chassis), Whiteline 24mm front and 22mm rear adjustable sway bars, and Hardrace front upper control arms with spherical bearings for camber correction under hard cornering
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (8th-gen Civic Si-specific) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, paired with a Seibon carbon fiber hood (Type R-style venting) and a custom 3M Matte Pearl White wrap with gloss black accents on the roof and mirrors

Voltex Type-3 rear wing (1,200mm width, 300mm height) mounted on custom aluminum pedestals with integrated third brake light, complemented by a custom front splitter from Verus Engineering with integrated canards and a 3D-printed ABS undertray for aero balance

Interior stripped and rebuilt with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (Honda-specific mounting brackets), a NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub, and a custom half-cage from Autopower Industries (8-point, TIG-welded, with gusseted joints) painted in PPG Honda Championship White (NH-574M)
